name: mtgi-skills
description: Internal Claude Cowork plugin marketplace for MTGI workflows — RFQ normalization, sourcing, and other trading-floor data tools.

plugins.name: rfq-normalizer
plugins.description: Normalize any vendor RFQ spreadsheet (xlsx/csv) into MTGI's canonical historical-import template. Auto-detects the header row and drops summary footers, splits free-text into five typed spec columns (capacity, interface, drive type, form factor, manufacturer), preserves extra vendor columns, normalizes conditions, and enriches missing fields via BrokerBin and Brave web search — with per-cell provenance and vendor-SKU swap detection.
